question: When do I become liable for tuition fees?
answer:
You become liable for tuition fees after the specified liability period.

For undergraduate students (including MArch Architecture, Integrated Masters, and PGCE courses), the liability periods are as follows: Liability Period 1: 25% of the tuition fee is due 21 days after the start of Term Liability Period 2: 50% of the tuition fee is due 7 days after the start of Term Liability Period 3: The remaining 100% of the tuition fee is due 7 days after the start of Term For postgraduate (taught and research) students, the liability periods are: Liability Period 1: 50% of the tuition fee is due 21 days after the start of Term Liability Period 2: The remaining 100% of the tuition fee is due 7 days after the start of Term
source: ChatBOT Document v2.pdf | Tuition Fee Policy.pdf
